text:
🚨💥 Cedric Itten to Werder Bremen - DONE DEAL ✔️

Verbal agreement in principle now reached with the 29 y/o striker. Itten will join on a free transfer from Fortuna Düsseldorf. Medical still pending.

The deal is expected to go through if nothing extraordinary happens, such as a late hijack etc. @berger_pj @SkySportDE 🇨🇭
